'''padhobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:obake|obake]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obake|obake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| padhobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pædhebeth|pædhebeth]] || [[word:pædhebej|pædhebej]] || [[word:pædhebesh|pædhebesh]] || [[word:pædhebe|pædhebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhodhoboth|padhodhoboth]] || [[word:padhodhoboj|padhodhoboj]] || [[word:padhodhobosh|padhodhobosh]] || [[word:padhodhobo|padhodhobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhoboth|padhoboth]] || [[word:padhoboj|padhoboj]] || [[word:padhobosh|padhobosh]] || [[word:padhobo|padhobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhofboth|padhofboth]] || [[word:padhofboj|padhofboj]] || [[word:padhofbosh|padhofbosh]] || [[word:padhofbof|padhofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:padhobotho|padhobotho]] || [[word:padhobojo|padhobojo]] || [[word:padhobosho|padhobosho]] || [[word:padhoboko|padhoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:padhoboth|padhoboth]] || [[word:padhoboj|padhoboj]] || [[word:padhobosh|padhobosh]] || [[word:padhobo|padhobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:padhobothol|padhobothol]] || [[word:padhobojol|padhobojol]] || [[word:padhoboshol|padhoboshol]] || [[word:padhobokol|padhobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:padhobothotho|padhobothotho]] || [[word:padhobojojo|padhobojojo]] || [[word:padhoboshosho|padhoboshosho]] || [[word:padhoboko|padhoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:padhobothon|padhobothon]] || [[word:padhobojon|padhobojon]] || [[word:padhoboshon|padhoboshon]] || [[word:padhobokon|padhobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:padhobothoro|padhobothoro]] || [[word:padhobojoro|padhobojoro]] || [[word:padhoboshoro|padhoboshoro]] || [[word:padhobokoro|padhobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
